question_html: Which of the following sentences is correct?
options_html: The lawyer requested that the evidence be reviewed.
The lawyer requested that the evidence is reviewed.
The lawyer requested the evidence should be reviewed.
The lawyer requested that the evidence was reviewed.
correct_answer_html: The lawyer requested that the evidence be reviewed.

question_html: If we had a boat, we _____ the river.
I don’t like sushi and ______.
Rina had her nails _____ at the salon.
Neeha was so furious that she stopped playing the piano because her teacher insisted that she ____ her scales.
My sister was very hardworking, and _____.
Which of the following sentences is correct?
options_html: Fruits wouldn’t ripen if the sun didn’t shine.
Fruits did not ripen if the sun didn’t shine.
Fruits will not ripen if the sun didn’t shine.
Fruits have not riped if the sun didn’t shine.
correct_answer_html: Fruits wouldn’t ripen if the sun didn’t shine.
